content:
### Phase 2: Dashboard Graphed Document Reader
### Phase 3: Intelligence (Reasoner + Docs Check)

### Phase 4: Enforcement (Hooks + Git Triggers)

| Action | File | Responsibility |
|--------|------|---------------|
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-cli/src/main.rs:53-204` | Add `--incremental`/`--files` flags to `Ingest` command |
| Modify | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-cli/src/main.rs:244-265` | Add `InitHooks` variant to `WorkspaceCommands` |
| Create | `repos/corvia/crates/corvia-cli/src/hooks.rs` | Hook generation: placement script, post-commit hooks, settings.json merge |
| Generated | `.corvia/hooks/doc-placement-check.sh` | Generated by `init-hooks`: PreToolUse validation script |
| Generated | `repos/*/.git/hooks/post-commit` | Generated by `init-hooks`: git-triggered incremental re-index |
| Merged | `.claude/settings.json` | Merged by `init-hooks`: Write\|Edit hook registration |
| Modify | `CLAUDE.md` | Add doc save location instructions |

---
